title.en: Research on the Control-Flow Model, Performance Differences, and Engineering Boundaries of while Loops and Recursion
title.zh: while 循环与递归的控制流模型、性能差异及工程使用边界研究

summary.en: A systematic study of while loops and recursion in Java, covering control-flow semantics, method invocation frames, StackOverflowError, explicit stacks with Deque and ArrayDeque, performance differences, applicable scenarios, recursion boundaries, and engineering recommendations.
summary.zh: 系统研究 Java 中 while 循环与递归，覆盖控制流语义、方法调用帧、StackOverflowError、基于 Deque 与 ArrayDeque 的显式栈、性能差异、适用场景、递归边界与工程推荐。

readingDirection.en: Read this when choosing between loops and recursion in Java, rewriting recursion as while plus an explicit stack, evaluating stack-overflow risk, or designing performance-sensitive traversal, parsing, DFS, backtracking, and state-machine code.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在 Java 中选择循环或递归、将递归改写为 while 加显式栈、评估栈溢出风险，或设计性能敏感的遍历、解析、DFS、回溯和状态机代码时阅读。
